phrases.intent_en: Where is the Apothecary Museum entrance?
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Eingang zum Apothekenmuseum?
phrases.cultural_note: In German cultural context, museums often have clearly marked entrances. The response assumes the museum is a distinct building or wing.

likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the courtyard.

responses.english: At the end of the courtyard.

phrases.intent_en: How do I book the guided English tour?
phrases.text_local: Wie buche ich die englische Führung?
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours at German castles often require booking at the ticket counter or in advance online. Staff will refer to the most practical option.

phrases.intent_en: Is the audio guide available in Chinese?
phrases.text_local: Gibt es den Audioguide auch auf Chinesisch?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides in multiple languages are common at major tourist attractions in Germany. Staff typically direct interested visitors to the rental desk.

phrases.intent_en: Can I pay by card at the garden café?
phrases.text_local: Kann man im Schlosscafé mit Karte zahlen?
phrases.cultural_note: German businesses increasingly accept card payments, but some smaller venues may prefer cash. The café is likely to confirm card acceptance.
